title: Vulkan Enhanced
description: A modpack centered around the usage of the Vulkan rendering API, with several other performance enhancements. Also comes with shaders.
body:
# Vulkan Enhanced Vulkan Enhanced is a modpack centered around the usage of the Vulkan rendering API in Minecraft, rather than outdated OpenGL. Unlike OpenGL, Vulkan directly communicates with the hardware, giving a signifigant performance boost. In addition, Vulkan Enhanced comes with many other performance-enhancement mods, and a few utility mods as well. Additionally, unlike other Vulkan-centered modpacks, Vulkan Enhanced comes with shaders! Thanks to the amazing work of [xCollateral](https://modrinth.com/user/xCollateral) (the same person that also works on VulkanMod), [Beryl](https://modrinth.com/project/rYeGeBaO) allows us to have full shader support with Vulkan on some versions # Version support Notices: - `Not Enough Vulkan` currently only supports `1.21.11` through `1.21.9`, so other versions will use `VulkanMod Extra` - `Beryl` currently only supports `1.21.11`. It is unknown whether it will be backported or not. ## 1.21.x **For users playing on 1.21.5 - 1.21.3:** > There is a known issue where VulkanMod causes an out-of-memory crash at startup. Can be fixed by appending `-Dorg.lwjgl.system.stackSize=256` to your game's Java arguments. Version |Supported |Shaders |Notes ----------|----------|----------|---------- 1.21.11 |✅ |✅ |n/a 1.21.5 |✅ |❌ |OOM issue on startup, check notice under 1.21.x section. 1.21.4 |✅ |❌ |OOM issue on startup, check notice under 1.21.x section. 1.21.3 |✅ |❌ |
  • OOM issue on startup, check notice under 1.21.x
  • `ModernFix` replaced with `Debugify` due to it not being supported on 1.21.3.
